homepage.heroSubline: Durable floors, expertly installed. Serving New York City and surrounding areas with pride and precision.
aboutText: Connect Floorz began over a decade ago with a simple goal: to provide New Yorkers with flooring solutions that stand the test of time. We saw a need for reliable, skilled contractors who understood the unique challenges of the city's diverse architecture.

Our approach is straightforward: quality materials, meticulous craftsmanship, and transparent communication. We believe in doing the job right the first time, ensuring your satisfaction and building lasting relationships with our clients.
We're deeply rooted in the New York community. We source materials locally whenever possible and actively support local initiatives. Your project helps us invest back into the city we call home.

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free quote and discover the perfect flooring solution for your needs.

services.name: Hardwood Flooring
services.shortDescription: Timeless elegance and lasting durability for your home or business.
services.description:
Hardwood flooring brings warmth and sophistication to any space. At Connect Floorz, we specialize in the installation, repair, and refinishing of all types of hardwood floors. From classic oak and maple to exotic species like Brazilian cherry and bamboo, we offer a wide selection to suit your style and budget.

Our experienced installers understand the nuances of working with hardwood, ensuring proper acclimation, precise cuts, and seamless transitions. We handle everything from subfloor preparation to the final coat of finish, leaving you with a floor that's both beautiful and durable. We also offer dustless sanding and refinishing to restore your existing hardwood floors to their original luster, minimizing disruption to your home or business. Considering NYC's older buildings, we are experts at leveling and preparing uneven subfloors common in brownstones and pre-war apartments.

Whether you're renovating a historic townhouse or updating a modern condo, Connect Floorz has the expertise to deliver exceptional hardwood flooring solutions. We use only the highest quality materials and employ proven techniques to ensure lasting beauty and value.
process: Step 2: Precise measurements and material ordering

faq.question: How long does hardwood flooring installation take?
faq.answer: Typically, installation takes 2-5 days, depending on the size and complexity of the project. Refinishing can be completed in 1-3 days.

faq.question: What type of hardwood is best for high-traffic areas?
faq.answer: Harder wood species like oak, maple, and hickory are more resistant to scratches and dents, making them ideal for high-traffic areas.

faq.question: How often should I refinish my hardwood floors?
faq.answer: With proper care, hardwood floors typically need refinishing every 7-10 years. Factors like foot traffic and the type of finish used can affect the lifespan.

services.name: Tile Flooring
services.shortDescription: Durable, stylish, and versatile flooring for any room in your home.
services.description:
Tile flooring is a practical and aesthetically pleasing choice for kitchens, bathrooms, and other high-moisture areas. Connect Floorz offers a wide variety of tile options, including ceramic, porcelain, natural stone, and mosaic tiles. We can install tile floors in any pattern or design, from simple layouts to intricate mosaics.

Our skilled tile installers ensure proper subfloor preparation, precise cuts, and grout lines, and a waterproof seal to prevent moisture damage. We work with a variety of tile sizes and styles, including large-format tiles, subway tiles, and decorative accents. We're experienced in working with the tight spaces and unique layouts found in many NYC apartments.

Whether you're looking for a classic, contemporary, or modern look, Connect Floorz can help you find the perfect tile flooring solution for your needs. We use only the highest quality materials and employ proven techniques to ensure lasting beauty and performance. We also handle tile repairs and grout restoration.
process: Step 1: Design consultation and tile selection
Step 3: Precise tile installation and grouting
benefits: Available in a wide variety of styles

faq.question: What is the difference between ceramic and porcelain tile?
faq.answer: Porcelain tile is denser and more durable than ceramic tile, making it a better choice for high-traffic areas and outdoor applications. Porcelain is also less porous than ceramic.

faq.question: How do I clean and maintain tile floors?
faq.answer: Regular cleaning with a mild detergent and water is sufficient for most tile floors. Avoid using abrasive cleaners or harsh chemicals, which can damage the grout and tile surface.

faq.question: Can you install tile over existing flooring?
faq.answer: In some cases, tile can be installed over existing flooring if the subfloor is level and structurally sound. However, it's often best to remove the old flooring to ensure proper adhesion and prevent moisture problems.

services.name: Laminate Flooring
services.shortDescription: Affordable, durable, and stylish alternative to hardwood and tile.
services.description:
Laminate flooring offers the look of hardwood or tile at a fraction of the cost. Connect Floorz offers a wide selection of laminate flooring options, including wood-look, stone-look, and tile-look laminates. Laminate is a great option for NYC apartments due to its durability and ease of maintenance.

Our experienced installers ensure proper subfloor preparation and precise installation for a seamless and long-lasting finish. We work with a variety of laminate styles and thicknesses to suit your needs and budget. Laminate is particularly well-suited for basements due to its moisture resistance.

Whether you're looking for a budget-friendly flooring solution or a durable option for high-traffic areas, Connect Floorz can help you find the perfect laminate flooring for your needs. We use only the highest quality materials and employ proven techniques to ensure lasting beauty and performance.
benefits: Wide variety of styles and colors

faq.question: Is laminate flooring waterproof?
faq.answer: While some laminate flooring is water-resistant, it is not completely waterproof. It's important to clean up spills promptly to prevent water damage.

faq.question: How long does laminate flooring last?
faq.answer: With proper care, laminate flooring can last 10-20 years or more.

faq.question: Can I install laminate flooring myself?
faq.answer: While DIY installation is possible, professional installation is recommended to ensure proper subfloor preparation and a seamless finish.

services.name: Vinyl Flooring
services.shortDescription: Waterproof, resilient, and comfortable flooring for any room.
services.description:
Vinyl flooring is a versatile and practical choice for kitchens, bathrooms, and basements. Connect Floorz offers a wide variety of vinyl flooring options, including sheet vinyl, vinyl tile, and luxury vinyl plank (LVP). Vinyl is known for its waterproof and scratch-resistant properties, which are ideal for NYC's diverse climate.

Our experienced installers ensure proper subfloor preparation and precise installation for a seamless and long-lasting finish. We work with a variety of vinyl styles and thicknesses to suit your needs and budget. Luxury vinyl plank offers the look and feel of hardwood or tile with the added benefits of vinyl.

Whether you're looking for a waterproof flooring solution or a comfortable option for high-traffic areas, Connect Floorz can help you find the perfect vinyl flooring for your needs. We use only the highest quality materials and employ proven techniques to ensure lasting beauty and performance.
benefits: Wide variety of styles and colors

faq.question: Is vinyl flooring suitable for basements?
faq.answer: Yes, vinyl flooring is an excellent choice for basements due to its waterproof properties.

faq.question: How long does vinyl flooring last?
faq.answer: With proper care, vinyl flooring can last 15-25 years or more.

faq.question: What is the difference between sheet vinyl and vinyl tile?
faq.answer: Sheet vinyl comes in large rolls, while vinyl tile comes in individual squares or planks. Sheet vinyl offers a seamless surface, while vinyl tile allows for more design flexibility.

services.name: Floor Repair Services
services.shortDescription: Expert floor repair services to restore your floors to their original condition.
services.description:
From minor scratches and dents to major damage, Connect Floorz offers comprehensive floor repair services to restore your floors to their original condition. We understand the wear and tear that floors endure, especially in a bustling city like New York. We handle everything from hardwood refinishing and tile replacement to subfloor repairs and structural reinforcement.

Our experienced technicians assess the damage and recommend the most effective repair solutions. We use only the highest quality materials and employ proven techniques to ensure lasting repairs. We can match existing flooring styles and colors to seamlessly blend the repairs with the surrounding areas. We are familiar with the challenges of repairing floors in older buildings, including uneven subfloors and historical materials.

Whether you have hardwood, tile, laminate, or vinyl flooring, Connect Floorz has the expertise to repair it. We strive to minimize disruption to your home or business and complete repairs quickly and efficiently. We also offer preventative maintenance services to extend the life of your floors.
process: Step 1: Damage assessment and repair plan
benefits: Restores the beauty and value of your floors
Extends the life of your flooring

faq.question: How much does floor repair cost?
faq.answer: The cost of floor repair depends on the extent of the damage and the type of flooring. We offer free estimates to assess the damage and provide an accurate quote.

faq.question: Can you repair water-damaged floors?
faq.answer: Yes, we can repair water-damaged floors, but it's important to address the water source first to prevent further damage. We can also help with mold remediation.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency floor repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer emergency floor repair services for urgent situations. Contact us for immediate assistance.

services.name: Floor Installation Services
services.shortDescription: Professional floor installation services for all types of flooring.
services.description:
Connect Floorz provides expert floor installation services for all types of flooring, including hardwood, tile, laminate, and vinyl. We understand that proper installation is crucial for the longevity and performance of your floors. We handle everything from subfloor preparation to the final finishing touches.

Our experienced installers ensure precise measurements, level surfaces, and seamless transitions. We work with a variety of flooring styles and materials to suit your needs and budget. We are familiar with the building codes and regulations in New York City and surrounding areas.

Whether you're renovating your home or building a new commercial space, Connect Floorz has the expertise to deliver exceptional floor installation services. We use only the highest quality materials and employ proven techniques to ensure lasting beauty and performance. We also offer demolition and removal services for old flooring.
benefits: Extends the life of your flooring
Provides a beautiful and functional space

faq.question: How long does floor installation take?
faq.answer: The duration of floor installation depends on the size of the project and the type of flooring. We provide estimated timelines during the consultation process.

faq.question: Do you offer a warranty on floor installation?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a warranty on our floor installation services to ensure your satisfaction.

faq.question: What is the best way to prepare for floor installation?
faq.answer: Remove all furniture and belongings from the area. Ensure the subfloor is clean, level, and dry. Contact us for specific preparation instructions.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Connect Floorz did an amazing job installing new hardwood floors in my living room. The team was professional, efficient, and the floors look absolutely stunning. They even helped me choose the perfect stain to match my furniture. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: I had some cracked tiles in my bathroom, and Connect Floorz was able to repair them quickly and affordably. The repairman was courteous and knowledgeable, and the finished product looks great. I'm very happy with their service.

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: Connect Floorz installed laminate flooring in my basement, and I couldn't be happier with the results. The floors are durable, easy to clean, and look fantastic. The installation team was professional and efficient, and they completed the job on time and within budget.

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: We had Connect Floorz install vinyl flooring in our kitchen, and it's been a game-changer. It's so easy to clean and looks great. The installers were professional and efficient, and we're very happy with the results. They were also very careful when working in our 100-year old Brooklyn brownstone.

reviews.name: Sarah H.
reviews.text: Connect Floorz refinished our hardwood floors, and they look like new! The team was professional and did a great job minimizing dust. The floors now have a beautiful shine, and we're thrilled with the results.

reviews.name: Robert P.
reviews.text: I had a section of damaged hardwood flooring in my office due to a water leak. Connect Floorz was able to repair the damage seamlessly. You can't even tell there was ever a problem. Exceptional workmanship!
